caption: The video captures a live performance featuring two musicians on stage, engaging with an audience. On the left, a woman with short gray hair, wearing a teal top and a colorful scarf, stands singing into a microphone. To her right, a man with long dark hair tied back, dressed in a white shirt and a black vest adorned with intricate embroidery, plays a guitar. He also sings into a microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of wooden blinds, and the audience is visible in the foreground, attentively watching the performance. The scene conveys a warm and intimate atmosphere, suggesting a folk or acoustic music event. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the venue or organization hosting the event.
